title: Valai Osai Kala Kala Kalavena Lyrics Sathya
stanzas: <div>Valai Osai Kala Kala Kalavena Lyrics Sathya

Valai osai kala kala kalavena
kavithaigal padikkuthu
kulu kulu thendral
kaatrum veesudhu.

sila neram silu silu silu ena
siru viral pada pada
thudikkuthu engum
dhegam koosudhu.

chinna penn pennalla
vanna poondhottam
kottattum maelamthaan
andru kadhal thaerottam.

Valai osai kala kala kalavena
kavithaigal padikkuthu
kulu kulu thendral
kaatrum veesudhu.

sila neram silu silu silu ena
siru viral pada pada
thudikkuthu engum
dhegam koosudhu.

oru kadhal kaditham
vizhi podum.
unnai kaanum sabalam
varak koodum.

nee paarkkum paarvaigal
poovaagum.
nenjukkul thaikkindra
mullaagum

kannae en kan patta kaayam
kaivaika thaanaaga aarum.
munnaalum pinnaalum
thallaadum
semmaeni en maeni
un tholil aadum naal.

Valai osai kala kala kalavena
kavithaigal padikkuthu
kulu kulu thendral
kaatrum veesudhu.

sila neram silu silu silu ena
siru viral pada pada
thudikkuthu engum
dhegam koosudhu.

chinna penn pennalla
vanna poondhottam
kottatatum maelamthana
andru kadhal thaerottam.

Valai osai kala kala kalavena
kavithaigal padikkuthu
kulu kulu thendral
kaatrum veesudhu.

Unnai kaanadhurugum
nodi neram.
pala maadha varudam
ena maarum.

neengaatha reengaaram
naanthaane
nenjodu nenjaaga nindrene

raagangal thaazhangal nooru
Raja un paer sollum paaru.
sindhaamal nindraadum
sendhaene
sangeetham undaagum
nee paesum paechilthaan.

Valai osai kala kala kalavena
kavithaigal padikkuthu
kulu kulu thendral
kaatrum veesudhu.

sila neram silu silu silu ena
siru viral pada pada

dhegam koosudhu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, capturing the beauty of romantic moments.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Sathya.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary Lata Mangeshkar and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the iconic Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released on September 29, 1988.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Sathya, Valai Osai Kala Kala serves as a poignant reflection of love and the fleeting moments that define relationships. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, transporting listeners to a time of innocence and romance. It beautifully captures the essence of young love, making it a perfect fit for weddings and anniversaries. The collaboration of Lata Mangeshkar and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam adds a timeless quality, ensuring its place in the hearts of music lovers.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Valai Osai Kala Kala is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voices of Lata Mangeshkar and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, this song from the classic Sathya is a must-listen for any music lover. Experience the magic of Ilaiyaraaja's composition that transcends generations.
stanzaMeanings: The sound of the trap is reading poems, the gentle breeze is blowing.
For a while, the small fingers are tapping softly, the body is moving everywhere.
The little girl is not just a girl, she is a colorful flower, and that is the love that blooms.
The sound of the trap is reading poems, the gentle breeze is blowing.
For a while, the small fingers are tapping softly, the body is moving everywhere.
The little girl is not just a girl, she is a colorful flower, and that is the love that blooms.
A love letter will bring a glance. Seeing you will bring joy.
The way you look will be like a flower. There will be thorns in the heart.
Oh my dear, my eyes are like a treasure. No one can take them away. Yesterday and today, my heart dances with your work.
The sound of the trap is reading poems, the gentle breeze is blowing.
For a while, the small fingers are tapping softly, the body is moving everywhere.
The little girl is not just a girl, she is a colorful flower, and that is the love that blooms.
The sound of the trap is reading poems, the gentle breeze is blowing.
When I see you, time stops. Many months and years will change.
I am not the one who will leave, I will stay with my heart.
The melodies will flow, a hundred kings will speak your name. Without thinking, the music will be created, and you will speak in your words.
The sound of the trap is reading poems, the gentle breeze is blowing.
For a while, the small fingers are tapping softly, the body is moving everywhere.
The little girl is not just a girl, she is a colorful flower, and that is the love that blooms.
The sound of the trap is reading poems, the gentle breeze is blowing.
For a while, the small fingers are tapping softly, the body is moving everywhere.
